item.title: Flappy Bird Clone
item.description: Classic Flappy Bird game made with SDL2 and C++. I want to build a game without using a game engine, so i picked SDL2 and C++. Implemented game mechanics like Collision Detection, Bird Movement, rendering is done with SDL’s built-in renderer. Font rendering is done with SDL_ttf. Learned a lot from this project(vector math and collision detection). Project is available in Github.

item.title: Out Of Memory
item.description: 2D Shooter Out Of Memory is a 2d shooter game made for BYOG 2022 Game Jam. This game was made in 48 hrs with the help of another programmer. Implemented game mechanics and core programming(Player Shooting/Enemy Movement) with C# in Unity Engine. You can download the game from itch.io: Rescue Game by Abhay_Joshi, Abhishek Joshi

item.title: Personal Projects
item.description: Some non commercial personal projects I’ve worked on! FlappyBird Clone A clone of Flappy Bird written in C++ and SDL2. Read more Out Of Memory 2D Shooter game made in 48 hrs. Read more You Are Not Alone 2D Platformer puzzle solving game made in 48 hours. Read more Sky Towers First person shooter made in 7 days. Read more Rescue Game 2D shooter made in 7 days. Read more

item.title: Rescue Game
item.description: 2D Shooter Rescue Game is a 2d shooter game made for a Game Jam. This game was made in 7 days with the help of another programmer. Implemented game mechanics and core programming(Player Shooting/Enemy Movement) with C# in Unity Engine. You can download the game from itch.io: Rescue Game by Abhay_Joshi, Abhishek Joshi

item.title: Sky Towers
item.description: First Person Shooter Sky Towers is a first person shooter made for a Game Jam. This game was made in 7 days with the help of another programmer. Implemented game mechanics and core programming(Player Shooting/UI) with C# in Unity Engine. You can download the game from itch.io: Rescue Game by Abhay_Joshi, Abhishek Joshi

item.title: You Are Not Alone
item.description: 2D Platformer You Are Not Alone is a 2d platformer made for BYOG 2021 Game Jam. This game was made in 48 hrs with the help of another programmer. Implemented game mechanics and core programming(Player Movement/Character Switching) with C# in Unity Engine. You can download the game from itch.io: Rescue Game by Abhay_Joshi, Abhishek Joshi

item.title: About
item.description: Resume Hi! I’m Abhay, a hardworking programmer. I am passionate about programming and game development. I’m always eager to learn and leverage my skills. I am aware of my shortcomings and am working to improve them. Over the years though i’ve honed my experience with the following: Languages: C/C++, C#. Version Control Software: Git Project Management Tools: Trello Software: Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code. Engines: Unity and other industry leading proprietary technologies.
